## X-Sense Home Security v1.2.6.50

### Camera WebRTC
- Continues prerelease camera testing for accounts where audio starts but video still does not render.
- Stops advertising the old Home Assistant native WebRTC bridge for X-Sense WebRTC cameras.
- Keeps X-Sense WebRTC camera viewing on the AlexxIT/WebRTC go2rtc-compatible raw H264 stream source.

### Debug Logging
- Makes follow-up logs clearly show the raw H264 stream path instead of the removed native bridge path.
